name: AeroPilot
onCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y gcc-arm-none-eabi qemu-system-arm cppcheck cmake && pip3 install --break-system-packages matplotlib && git submodule update --init --recursive
postAttachCommand: echo 'AeroPilot ready. Run:  ./scripts/demo.sh   (build + fly on QEMU + decode telemetry)'
